collectorDecision.rationale: Planning phase successfully completed. Comprehensive test coverage plan developed with 24 actionable test cases across all 6 validation areas (propagation emission, filter emission, transformer parenting, null output handling, orphan buffering, deduplication). Test strategy clearly defined with 4-phase execution model and 10-step implementation roadmap. Ready to advance to implementation phase to execute test plan and validate all discovery findings.

planningDeliverables.planTitle: Comprehensive Test Coverage Plan for Artifact Tree Integrity Validation

T-001_PropagationArtifactEmission.scope: Propagation event emission, artifact persistence, correlation key deduplication, batch emissions

T-002_FilterArtifactEmission.scope: Filter decision records (no FilterEvent), action values, stream artifact parenting

T-003_TransformerParenting.scope: Parent-child linkage, chained transformations, multi-output scenarios

T-004_NullOutputHandling.scope: Null output in propagation/transformer/filter, orphan buffer stability

T-005_OrphanArtifactBuffering.scope: Orphan detection, buffering, parent linking, out-of-order arrival, cleanup

T-006_ContentHashDeduplication.scope: Tree-level dedup, database constraints, cross-execution dedup, collision resistance, space efficiency

phases.name: Unit Tests
phases.scope: Individual service methods and tree operations

phases.name: Integration Tests
phases.scope: Service interactions, event flow, database persistence

phases.name: End-to-End Tests
phases.coverage: All discovery areas, complete data flow

mappings.discoveryFinding: Orphan artifact buffering mechanism is correctly implemented
mappings.implementationValidation: T-005 test cases (5 tests) validate orphan detection, buffering, linking, out-of-order arrival, and cleanup

mappings.discoveryFinding: Null output graceful handling implemented across all execution services
mappings.implementationValidation: T-004 test cases (4 tests) validate null output in propagation, transformer, filter, and orphan buffer stability

mappings.discoveryFinding: Event-driven persistence chain verified from emission through database
mappings.implementationValidation: T-001 (propagation), T-002 (filter), T-003 (transformer) test persistence aspects; integration tests validate complete chain
T-006 test cases (5 tests) validate tree-level dedup, database constraints, cross-execution dedup, and efficiency
T-003 test cases (3 tests) validate parent-child linkage, chaining, and multi-output scenarios

firstImplementationTasks: Set up test fixtures and database harness
Configure test profiles (H2 for unit/integration, PostgreSQL for E2E)
Create base test classes and utilities
expectedDeliverables: All 24 test cases implemented and passing
Code coverage reports (90%+ for critical paths)
Gap analysis and additional tests if needed
nextPhasePreparation.gateKeeper: All tests passing + coverage targets met = verification complete

planningCollectorConclusion.collectorRecommendation: ADVANCE_PHASE to IMPLEMENTATION - Execute comprehensive test plan as defined in planning-output-test-coverage-plan.json
